allow: PowerShell($env:NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=4096"; node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build 2>&1 | Select-String "built in|error during|FATAL")

PowerShell($env:NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=4096"; node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match "built in|error during|FATAL|transformed|failed" } | Select-Object -Last 3)
PowerShell($env:NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=4096"; node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match "built in|error during|FATAL|failed" })
